div.head: 164. Editorial Note
div.p: [2 paragraphs from the Memorandum of Discussion at the 398th Meeting of the National Security Council on March 5 and 1-1/2 pages from the Memorandum of Discussion at the 399th Meeting of the National Security Council on March 12 not declassified. (Eisenhower Library, Whitman File, NSC Records)]
